title: S + V + to V（不定詞作受詞）

formulas.zh: 主詞＋想要/希望/計劃/決定/期望＋不定詞
主詞＋希望/拒絕/同意/承諾/提供＋不定詞

explanation: 此句型用於表達主詞的意願、計畫或期望。動詞（want, hope, plan, decide, expect等）後接不定詞作受詞，表示尚未實現的行動。不定詞前的to不能省略。這些動詞都是「控制動詞」，主詞通常是執行不定詞後動作的人。常用於表述目標、願望或決策，是英文中表達主觀意向的重要句型，須注意某些動詞的特定搭配規則。

examples.eng: I hope to travel around Europe next summer vacation.
examples.chi: 我希望在明年暑假環遊歐洲。

examples.eng: She decided to study medicine at National Taiwan University.
examples.chi: 她決定在臺灣大學念醫學系。

examples.eng: My parents expect me to score well on the college entrance exam.
examples.chi: 我的父母期望我在大學入學考試中取得高分。

examples.eng: He promised to help me finish this project before Friday.
examples.chi: 他承諾在星期五前幫我完成這個項目。

extension.tip: 判斷關鍵：看主詞是否能執行不定詞後的動作。want/hope/plan表述計畫性，decide表達決策點，expect表達預期與要求。注意refuse和agree的使用時機：refuse表拒絕，agree表同意。某些動詞如manage強調克服困難才成功。

examples.test: I want to become a teacher. vs. I want you to become a teacher.
examples.result: → 第一句主詞I執行become動作；第二句主詞I想要you執行become動作（需用want + 受詞 + to V的複雜結構）。本句型僅指主詞自身執行的動作。

examples.test: He refused to sign the contract. vs. He refused signing the contract.
examples.result: → refused to sign是標準用法；refusing（動名詞）用於refuse後較不常見。本句型動詞後必須用不定詞to V。

examples.test: She hopes to pass the exam. vs. She hopes passing the exam.
examples.result: → hopes to pass正確；hopes passing錯誤。hope只接不定詞，不接動名詞。

extension.note: 記憶口訣：「意願計畫來不定，主詞自己做動作；want, hope, plan, decide, expect是常客。」

parts: become a successful engineer in the future.
exercises.sentence: My brother wants to become a successful engineer in the future.
exercises.translation: 我哥哥希望將來能成為一位成功的工程師。

parts: new policies to protect the environment.
exercises.sentence: The government decided to implement new policies to protect the environment.
exercises.translation: 政府決定實施新政策以保護環境。

parts: attend the meeting on time tomorrow.
exercises.sentence: She promised to attend the meeting on time tomorrow.
exercises.translation: 她承諾明天準時參加會議。

exercises.sentence: Our teachers expect us to study hard for the final exams.
exercises.translation: 我們的老師期望我們為期末考而努力讀書。
